overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white lab coat navigating through a Soviet-era industrial facility. The character descends a concrete stairwell, walks through corridors, passes through an office with vintage furniture, and enters a technical control room with vintage computer equipment.

events.description: descending into a darker section of the stairwell before reaching a doorway

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete stairwell with red metal handrails on the right side

entered.detail: large precast concrete wall panels with visible horizontal seams
painted red metal handrail running along the staircase edge
wall-mounted tube light fixture providing artificial illumination
wall-mounted electrical panel with visible conduit

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow concrete stairwell with red metal handrails. The walls are made of large precast concrete panels, and the lighting comes from wall-mounted fluorescent fixtures. The atmosphere is dim and industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: institutional corridor with two-tone painted walls

events.description: turning right at a corner in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with blue lower walls and cream upper walls, passing barred windows

entered.detail: walls painted blue on the bottom half and cream on the top half
folding metal security gate blocking a side passage
window with vertical metal bars set into the wall
closed wooden door with frame in the corridor wall
posters affixed to the wall including one with cyrillic text

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long institutional corridor with two-tone walls. The floor has a checkerboard tile pattern. A metal security gate is visible on the left, and barred windows line the right wall. The character turns a corner midway through.

scene_state.functional_zone: office quarters with vintage furniture and television

events.description: opening a wooden door and entering a furnished office space from the corridor
exiting the office through a rear door into a technical control room

agents.ego_description: entering a room with wooden furniture, walking past another scientist standing near a television set

notable_agents.action: standing near the television set facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large wooden desk with papers and items on the surface
old CRT television set on a wooden stand displaying an image
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors containing items
upholstered sofa placed against the wall
poster with cyrillic text and silhouette graphic on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a furnished office space with wooden parquet flooring. The room contains a desk, sofa, wooden cabinets, and a vintage television. Another person in a lab coat stands near the TV. The character crosses the room and exits through a rear door.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage computer control room with overhead cabling

events.description: approaching the main control console and stopping to examine the equipment

agents.ego_description: approaching a large control panel and leaning in to examine the switches, gauges, and monitors

entered.detail: large desk covered with buttons, switches, analog gauges, and control panels
old CRT monitor with green text display on the console
metal trays mounted on the ceiling carrying bundles of cables
shelving unit with binders and technical equipment
articulating arm desk lamp on the control console
red upholstered office chair in front of the console

segments.scene_description: The character enters a technical control room filled with vintage computer equipment. Overhead cable trays run across the ceiling. The character approaches a large control console with numerous switches, gauges, and monitors, stopping to examine the equipment closely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim Soviet-era industrial facility that transitions from stark concrete utility areas into a detailed technical control center. It begins with a descent down a narrow concrete stairwell flanked by red metal handrails and fluorescent lighting, moving seamlessly into a long institutional corridor with checkerboard tiles and barred windows. As the character turns a corner, the sterile environment shifts into a furnished office featuring wooden parquet flooring, a vintage television, and another figure in a lab coat. The scene then expands as the character exits through a rear door and enters a technical control room dominated by overhead cable trays. Finally, the camera closes in on a large control console filled with vintage switches, gauges, and monitors.
